title: papaver somniferum var. hortense
intro: Papaver somniferum var. hortense, also known as the opium poppy hortense variety, is a type of poppy plant that is cultivated for its medicinal properties. This plant contains alkaloids such as morphine and codeine, which have analgesic and antispasmodic properties, making it a valuable source of pain relief and muscle relaxation. The medicinal properties of Papaver somniferum var. hortense have been used to treat various health issues, including chronic pain, insomnia, and digestive problems, and it is also used to relieve symptoms of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to promote relaxation and alleviate pain.
